languages.text: "Когнитивно одаренный примитив. Впрочем, это тебя не спасет. Ты своими руками пробудил ото сна застывших воинов, запустив примитивную силовую установку". {n}Из окружающего мрака выступают высокие костлявые фигуры ксеносов, сжимающих в руках оружие.{/n}

"A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Когнитивно одаренный примитив. Впрочем, это тебя не спасет. Ты своими руками пробудил ото сна застывших воинов, запустив примитивную силовую установку". {n}Из окружающего мрака выступают высокие костлявые фигуры ксеносов, сжимающих в руках оружие.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}

"A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}

"A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}

"A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}

languages.text: “一个认知天赋尚可的原始生物。但这救不了你。正是你亲手激活的那粗陋的能量源，唤醒了沉睡的战士。”{n}数个身形高大、骸骨般的异形从四周的幽影中浮现，手中紧握着武器。{/n}
languages.original_text: "A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “一个认知天赋尚可的原始生物。但这救不了你。正是你亲手激活的那粗陋的能量源，唤醒了沉睡的战士。”{n}数个身形高大、骸骨般的异形从四周的幽影中浮现，手中紧握着武器。{/n}

languages.text: «Un ser primitivo con capacidades cognitivas notables. Pero no bastará para salvarte. Con tus propias manos, has despertado a los guerreros inmóviles al activar esta fuente de energía rudimentaria». {n}Unos xenos altos y esqueléticos surgen de la penumbra, armas en mano.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Un ser primitivo con capacidades cognitivas notables. Pero no bastará para salvarte. Con tus propias manos, has despertado a los guerreros inmóviles al activar esta fuente de energía rudimentaria». {n}Unos xenos altos y esqueléticos surgen de la penumbra, armas en mano.{/n}

languages.text: « Une créature primitive étonnamment perceptive... Mais cela ne vous sauvera pas. En activant votre source d'énergie primitive, vous avez ramené ces guerriers immobiles à la vie. » {n}De grandes silhouettes squelettiques de xénos émergent des ténèbres environnantes, le poing serré sur leurs armes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Une créature primitive étonnamment perceptive... Mais cela ne vous sauvera pas. En activant votre source d'énergie primitive, vous avez ramené ces guerriers immobiles à la vie. » {n}De grandes silhouettes squelettiques de xénos émergent des ténèbres environnantes, le poing serré sur leurs armes.{/n}

languages.text: "Bilişsel yetenekli bir ilkel. Fakat bu seni kurtarmayacak. Kendi ellerinle, ilkel enerji kaynağını etkinleştirerek hareketsiz savaşçıları uyandırdın." {n}Zenoların uzun, iskeletimsi figürleri; ellerinde silahlarla etraftaki karanlıktan çıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bilişsel yetenekli bir ilkel. Fakat bu seni kurtarmayacak. Kendi ellerinle, ilkel enerji kaynağını etkinleştirerek hareketsiz savaşçıları uyandırdın." {n}Zenoların uzun, iskeletimsi figürleri; ellerinde silahlarla etraftaki karanlıktan çıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ein kognitiv begabter Primitiver. Aber das wird Euch nicht retten. Ihr habt mit Euren eigenen Händen die stillen Krieger geweckt, als ihr Eure primitive Energiequelle aktiviert habt." {n}Große, skelettierte Schemen bewaffneter Xenos lösen sich aus dem Zwielicht.{/n}
languages.original_text: "A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you. With your own hands, you awakened the still warriors by activating your crude energy source." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ein kognitiv begabter Primitiver. Aber das wird Euch nicht retten. Ihr habt mit Euren eigenen Händen die stillen Krieger geweckt, als ihr Eure primitive Energiequelle aktiviert habt." {n}Große, skelettierte Schemen bewaffneter Xenos lösen sich aus dem Zwielicht.{/n}

languages.text: 「知能に恵まれた原始人。しかしそれは君を救わないだろう」{n}周囲の暗闇から、背が高く骨の露出した異形の姿が武器を手に現れる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "A cognitively gifted primitive. But that will not save you." {n}Tall, skeletal figures of xenos emerge from the surrounding gloom, weapons clutched in their hands.{/n}
